ItacAcademyItem.Name: Novelli (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Mylender, there is one publication, not in British Library collections, related to this Academy: L`ateismo. Rappresentazione spirituale recitata dagli Accademici Novelli di Bologna (Bologna, Bartolomeo Cesi, 1620).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
